Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From, And To Impose, Monetary Sanctions On, Pltf David Henderson
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City & County of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff is granted as Plaintiff is ordered to serve verifications within 20 days of notice of this order. The court finds circumstances which make the imposition of sanctions unjust. Defendant's request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Continued To Jan-16-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set for 1/16/2007 at 1:30 pm in Dept. 212. Proceedings reported by: Noreen Ikeuye, CSR# 3538 (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From, And To Impose Monetary Sanctions On, Plaintiff David Henderson
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted as Plaintiff is ordered to serve verifications within 20 days of notice of this order. The court finds that the late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $320, to be paid within 45 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
